Label: Cluster 1-10 Buttons
Notes: Session-only selection (not persisted in ValueTree). Button text shows cluster number and assigned-input count (e.g. "3 (2)"). Buttons for empty clusters are dimmed (0.5 alpha). Color-coded to match Map cluster colors. RadioGroupId=1001.
Hover help text in the status bar: Select which cluster is being edited.
Keyboard shortcuts: Type a number 1-0 (0 = cluster 10) to select a cluster.

Label: Show/Hide Cluster Inputs
enum: Hide Cluster Inputs ; Show Cluster Inputs
Notes: Per-cluster. When 0, hides all member inputs' markers on the Map tab.
Hover help text in the status bar: Show or hide this cluster's member inputs on the Map.

Label: Assigned Inputs List
Notes: Per-cluster. Comma-separated list of input IDs in the display order of the Assigned Inputs list. Rows can be drag-reordered; the tracked input (if any) is locked at row 0 and cannot be moved. Multi-select supported. Empty string = numeric-ID fallback order. Hidden when the selected cluster has no assigned inputs.
Hover help text in the status bar: Drag to reorder inputs within the cluster.
Keyboard shortcuts: Drag the handle on the left of each row to reorder.

Label: Reference Mode
Notes: Per-cluster. Determines the pivot used by Rotation and Scale. Overridden by a tracked input if one exists in the cluster (tracked input always takes priority over this setting).
Hover help text in the status bar: Pivot point for rotation and scale transforms.

Label: Reference Point Display
Notes: Read-only. Shows the current reference-point position computed from the selected Reference Mode (or the tracked input if present). Three separate X / Y / Z labels.
Hover help text in the status bar: Live reference point used by rotation and scale.

Label: Status Label
Notes: Read-only. Orange text. Shows "Tracking: Input <N>" when a tracked input is the reference, or "No Inputs" when the cluster is empty, or blank otherwise.
Hover help text in the status bar: Cluster status information.

Label: Position XY
Notes: Auto-center spring-back to (0,0). 50 Hz timer integrates the deflection as a position delta applied to all member inputs (or to the tracked input's offset when a tracked input is present). Thumb #4CAF50, outer #3A3A3A. Not persisted; applies its effect to each input's positionX/Y (or offsetX/Y).
Hover help text in the status bar: Drag to move the whole cluster; releases back to center.

Label: Z Height
Notes: Auto-center spring-back to 0. 50 Hz integration applied to all member inputs' Z (or tracked input's Z-offset). Orange #FF5722 track.
Hover help text in the status bar: Drag vertically to move the cluster up/down; releases back to center.

Label: Attenuation
Notes: Auto-center spring-back to 0. 50 Hz integration applied as a relative dB change to every member input's attenuation. Orange track.
Hover help text in the status bar: Relative dB change to all cluster inputs.

Label: Rotation
Notes: Wrap-around dial (no min/max limit). Rotates all member inputs around the reference point in the selected Plane. Blue #2196F3. 50 Hz integration-style behavior (delta per rotation).
Hover help text in the status bar: Rotate the cluster around the reference point in the selected plane.

Label: Scale
Notes: Auto-center spring-back to 0 (neutral = 1.0x scale). Log-scale so equal up/down excursions produce matched scale up / scale down. Purple #9C27B0 track. Scales member inputs' positions relative to the reference point in the selected Plane.
Hover help text in the status bar: Scale the cluster outward/inward from the reference point.

Label: Plane Selector
UI: Drop down menu (overlaid on Rotation dial center)
Notes: Session-only (not persisted). Chooses the plane in which Rotation and Scale operate. XY = horizontal plane, XZ = looking down the depth axis, YZ = looking along width.
Hover help text in the status bar: Plane for rotation and scale transforms.

Label: LFO Active
Notes: Per-cluster. When off, all LFO controls are dimmed (0.5 alpha).
Hover help text in the status bar: Enable or disable the cluster LFO.

Label: LFO Period
Notes: Per-cluster. Log-scale dial. Value label is editable with direct text entry.
Hover help text in the status bar: Base period of the cluster LFO (seconds).

Label: LFO Phase (Global)
Notes: Per-cluster. Global phase offset applied to the LFO ramp before per-axis phase offsets.
Hover help text in the status bar: Cluster LFO global phase offset in degrees, range -180 to 180. 0 = start of cycle, 90 = quarter-cycle in, etc. Applied to the LFO ramp before the per-axis (X/Y/Z/Rot/Scale) phase offsets.

Label: LFO Progress
Notes: Read-only playhead display showing the current position of the LFO ramp (0-1 cycle).
Hover help text in the status bar: Current LFO ramp position.

Label: LFO Shape X
enum: Off (0) ; Sine (1) ; Square (2) ; Sawtooth (3) ; Triangle (4) ; Keystone (5) ; Log (6) ; Exp (7) ; Random (8)
Notes: Per-cluster. LFO waveform shape for the X axis. Greyed out when LFO Active is off or when Shape is Off (= inactive row).
Hover help text in the status bar: Waveform shape for cluster LFO on the X axis.

Label: LFO Rate X
Notes: Per-cluster. Log-scale rate multiplier relative to the base Period for the X axis. Greyed out when LFO Active is off or when Shape is Off.
Hover help text in the status bar: Rate multiplier for the cluster LFO on the X axis.

Label: LFO Amplitude X
Notes: Per-cluster. Amplitude of the X-axis position modulation in meters. Greyed out when LFO Active is off or when Shape X is Off.
Hover help text in the status bar: Amplitude of the cluster LFO on the X axis.

Label: LFO Phase X
Notes: Per-cluster. Phase offset (on top of the global LFO Phase) for the X axis.
Hover help text in the status bar: Cluster LFO X-axis phase offset in degrees, range -180 to 180. Stacks on top of the global clusterLFOphase. Use to desync axes within a cluster.

Label: LFO Shape Y
enum: Off (0) ; Sine (1) ; Square (2) ; Sawtooth (3) ; Triangle (4) ; Keystone (5) ; Log (6) ; Exp (7) ; Random (8)
Notes: Per-cluster. LFO waveform shape for the Y axis. Greyed out when LFO Active is off or when Shape is Off (= inactive row).
Hover help text in the status bar: Waveform shape for cluster LFO on the Y axis.

Label: LFO Rate Y
Notes: Per-cluster. Log-scale rate multiplier relative to the base Period for the Y axis. Greyed out when LFO Active is off or when Shape is Off.
Hover help text in the status bar: Rate multiplier for the cluster LFO on the Y axis.

Label: LFO Amplitude Y
Notes: Per-cluster. Amplitude of the Y-axis position modulation in meters. Greyed out when LFO Active is off or when Shape Y is Off.
Hover help text in the status bar: Amplitude of the cluster LFO on the Y axis.

Label: LFO Phase Y
Notes: Per-cluster. Phase offset (on top of the global LFO Phase) for the Y axis.
Hover help text in the status bar: Cluster LFO Y-axis phase offset in degrees, range -180 to 180. Stacks on top of the global clusterLFOphase.

Label: LFO Shape Z
enum: Off (0) ; Sine (1) ; Square (2) ; Sawtooth (3) ; Triangle (4) ; Keystone (5) ; Log (6) ; Exp (7) ; Random (8)
Notes: Per-cluster. LFO waveform shape for the Z axis. Greyed out when LFO Active is off or when Shape is Off (= inactive row).
Hover help text in the status bar: Waveform shape for cluster LFO on the Z axis.

Label: LFO Rate Z
Notes: Per-cluster. Log-scale rate multiplier relative to the base Period for the Z axis. Greyed out when LFO Active is off or when Shape is Off.
Hover help text in the status bar: Rate multiplier for the cluster LFO on the Z axis.

Label: LFO Amplitude Z
Notes: Per-cluster. Amplitude of the Z-axis position modulation in meters. Greyed out when LFO Active is off or when Shape Z is Off.
Hover help text in the status bar: Amplitude of the cluster LFO on the Z axis.

Label: LFO Phase Z
Notes: Per-cluster. Phase offset (on top of the global LFO Phase) for the Z axis.
Hover help text in the status bar: Cluster LFO Z-axis phase offset in degrees, range -180 to 180. Stacks on top of the global clusterLFOphase.

Label: LFO Shape Rot
enum: Off (0) ; Sine (1) ; Square (2) ; Sawtooth (3) ; Triangle (4) ; Keystone (5) ; Log (6) ; Exp (7) ; Random (8)
Notes: Per-cluster. LFO waveform shape for the Rot axis. Greyed out when LFO Active is off or when Shape is Off (= inactive row).
Hover help text in the status bar: Waveform shape for cluster LFO on the Rot axis.

Label: LFO Rate Rot
Notes: Per-cluster. Log-scale rate multiplier relative to the base Period for the Rot axis. Greyed out when LFO Active is off or when Shape is Off.
Hover help text in the status bar: Rate multiplier for the cluster LFO on the Rot axis.

Label: LFO Amplitude Rot
Notes: Per-cluster. Amplitude of the Rotation modulation in degrees (bipolar: negative = anti-clockwise). Greyed out when LFO Active is off or when Shape Rot is Off.
Hover help text in the status bar: Cluster rotation LFO amplitude in degrees, range -360 to 360. Bipolar: positive = counter-clockwise viewed from above (matches the inputRotation / outputOrientation convention), negative = clockwise. Cluster rotates around its reference point in the selected plane.

Label: LFO Phase Rot
Notes: Per-cluster. Phase offset (on top of the global LFO Phase) for the Rot axis.
Hover help text in the status bar: Cluster rotation LFO phase offset in degrees, range -180 to 180. Stacks on top of the global clusterLFOphase.

Label: LFO Shape Scale
enum: Off (0) ; Sine (1) ; Square (2) ; Sawtooth (3) ; Triangle (4) ; Keystone (5) ; Log (6) ; Exp (7) ; Random (8)
Notes: Per-cluster. LFO waveform shape for the Scale axis. Greyed out when LFO Active is off or when Shape is Off (= inactive row).
Hover help text in the status bar: Waveform shape for cluster LFO on the Scale axis.

Label: LFO Rate Scale
Notes: Per-cluster. Log-scale rate multiplier relative to the base Period for the Scale axis. Greyed out when LFO Active is off or when Shape is Off.
Hover help text in the status bar: Rate multiplier for the cluster LFO on the Scale axis.

Label: LFO Amplitude Scale
Notes: Per-cluster. Scale modulation amplitude, log-centered at 1.0x (0.1x to 10x). Greyed out when LFO Active is off or when Shape Scale is Off.
Hover help text in the status bar: Amplitude of the cluster LFO on the Scale axis.

Label: LFO Phase Scale
Notes: Per-cluster. Phase offset (on top of the global LFO Phase) for the Scale axis.
Hover help text in the status bar: Cluster scale LFO phase offset in degrees, range -180 to 180. Stacks on top of the global clusterLFOphase.

Label: Preset Tiles
Notes: Global (shared by all clusters). 16 preset slots in a 4x4 grid. Left-click recalls a preset into the selected cluster. Double-click recalls and activates the LFO. Middle/right-click stores the current cluster LFO state into that slot. Slow-click on an occupied tile edits its name in place. Populated tiles have a green tint and show active-axis letters (X, Y, Z, R, S) in the corner. Each preset stores 22 properties (period, phase, and 4 values x 5 axes).
Hover help text in the status bar: Recall, activate, store, or rename a cluster-LFO preset.
Keyboard shortcuts: Left-click to recall; double-click to recall + activate; middle/right-click to store.

Label: Stop All LFO
Notes: Global. Long-press (500 ms) to disable the LFO on all 10 clusters simultaneously. Red #B71C1C.
Hover help text in the status bar: Long-press to stop the LFO on every cluster.

Label: Export Presets
Notes: Global. Opens a file picker to save the 16 LFO presets as an XML file. Last-used folder remembered via AppSettings.
Hover help text in the status bar: Save the LFO preset bank to an XML file.

Label: Import Presets
Notes: Global. Opens a file picker to load an XML preset bank into the 16 slots. Refreshes the tile display on success.
Hover help text in the status bar: Load an LFO preset bank from an XML file.

Label: QLab Preset
Notes: Global. Visible only when a QLab target is configured and active in the Network tab. Creates a QLab network cue that recalls the selected LFO preset.
Hover help text in the status bar: Export the selected preset as a QLab network cue.
